description: TaxJar provides sales tax calculation, transaction import, reporting-related data handling, nexus information, and address/rate lookup services for ecommerce and business systems. Its product helps businesses manage U.S. sales tax compliance workflows across jurisdictions.
summary: TaxJar exposes a documented REST Sales Tax API authenticated with a user-generated API token; no public evidence of GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or a first-party standalone CLI was found.
